title: Tesla's Robotaxi rollout progress by the numbers: 7 key figures
excerpt: Tesla's latest figures on Robotaxi's expansion include seven operating US markets and 380,000 unsupervised miles driven.
content_html:
We have more numbers on Tesla's Robotaxi progress. Here are the 7 that matter most.

By Lloyd Lee

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Tesla has some numbers to tout for its progress on Robotaxi.

CEO Elon Musk and other executives said during Tesla's second-quarter earnings call on Wednesday that the company continues to expand its autonomous ride-hailing platform, adding more cities and more unsupervised rides.

Since Tesla first launched Robotaxi in June 2025 with a small fleet of Model Ys and safety monitors, the rollout of the company's ride-hailing service has been slower than Musk's predictions.

The CEO said in July 2025 that Tesla could reach half the US population by the end of 2025, pending regulatory approval.

Tesla now lists seven US metropolitan regions, including two Florida cities — Orlando and Tampa — announced on the eve of the company's Q2 earnings call.

The company has yet to disclose the size of its overall fleet, number of paid rides, intervention rates, or the economics of each trip.

Musk said during the earnings call that safety is central to the constraints on Robotaxi's deployment scale.

"If we injure even one person, it will be worldwide headline news, and regulators will immediately clamp down on our activities," he said. "We're going as fast as humanly possible in scaling Robotaxi, but while trying to ensure that we do not harm anyone at all and ideally do not even run over a pet."

Here are seven numbers that demonstrate Tesla's Robotaxi progress:

1. Nearly 2.5 million total paid miles

Tesla said in its shareholder deck that Robotaxi had reached nearly 2.5 million cumulative paid miles by the end of the second quarter.

The figure includes trips with a safety monitor — a human supervisor who oversees the autonomous software — in the car. In the San Francisco Bay Area, a safety monitor remains behind the wheel.

2. More than 380,000 unsupervised miles

Ashok Elluswamy, Tesla's VP of AI, said Robotaxi has driven more than 380,000 unsupervised miles across six cities in two different states.

This is one of the more concrete figures Tesla has provided around its progress for unsupervised rides. Tesla has yet to reveal how many cars are operating without a safety monitor.

For comparison, Alphabet's Waymo has driven more than 200 million fully autonomous, rider-only miles.

3. More than 10% weekly mileage growth

Musk said Robotaxi has seen a growth rate of more than 10% for miles driven per week.

Similarly, Elluswamy said unsupervised mileage has increased at "double-digit growth rates" per week since the beginning of the year.

"We expect to continue growing at such a large rate through the rest of this year," Elluswamy said.

4. Seven US metropolitan regions

Tesla said Robotaxi is now active in seven US markets: Austin, Dallas, Houston, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, and the San Francisco Bay Area.

All regions except for the Bay Area are "ramping unsupervised" rides, the company said in the shareholder deck.

Tesla is also targeting Phoenix and Las Vegas, with "preparations underway."

Meanwhile, Waymo operates in 11 US regions.

5. Zero 'notable incidents' from Robotaxi

Elluswamy said that there have been "zero notable incidents" over the more than 380,000 unsupervised Robotaxi miles driven. He added that the known incidents involved other road users hitting stationary Teslas.

Tesla has reported crashes to federal regulators, including two low-speed crashes that occurred after Tesla's teleoperator assumed direct control of the car. Both incidents had a safety monitor behind the wheel.

Elluswamy said the progress was a "huge validation of Tesla's entire AI approach."

6. More than 125,000 Cybercabs in manufacturing capacity

Tesla said it installed an annual manufacturing capacity of more than 125,000 Cybercabs — the company's purpose-built robotaxi — at Gigafactory Texas. Production began during the second quarter.

For comparison, Zoox, Amazon's robotaxi venture, says its factory in Hayward, California can assemble more than 10,000 purpose-built robotaxis a year once it operates at full scale. Waymo has said that its Arizona plant can build "tens of thousands" of robotaxis at full buildout.

Tesla's number does not represent the current production rate, which was not disclosed.

Musk said the Cybercab needs to accumulate more driving data specific to its chassis before the company can put more on the road.

Employees have started taking autonomous rides in the car at Gigafactory, Tesla said.

7. Nearly 1.5 million paid FSD customers

Tesla reported 1.48 million paying customers of Full Self-Driving, the automaker's advanced driver-assistance system. That represents a 56% year-over-year increase.

While FSD for personally owned vehicles requires constant human supervision, one of Tesla's long-standing promises is that the tech will no longer require driver monitoring.

Read next

Lloyd Lee

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

blocks.html_en: Tesla has some numbers to tout for its progress on Robotaxi.

sentences.en: Tesla has some numbers to tout for its progress on Robotaxi.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉有一些数字可以夸耀其在 Robotaxi 上的进展。

blocks.html_en: CEO Elon Musk and other executives said during Tesla's second-quarter earnings call on Wednesday that the company continues to expand its autonomous ride-hailing platform, adding more cities and more unsupervised rides.

sentences.en: CEO Elon Musk and other executives said during Tesla's second-quarter earnings call on Wednesday that the company continues to expand its autonomous ride-hailing platform, adding more cities and more unsupervised rides.
sentences.zh: 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克和其他高管在周三的特斯拉第二季度财报电话会议上表示，该公司将继续扩大其自动驾驶叫车平台，增加更多城市和更多无人监管的乘车服务。

blocks.html_en: Since Tesla first launched Robotaxi in June 2025 with a small fleet of Model Ys and safety monitors, the rollout of the company's ride-hailing service has been slower than Musk's predictions.

sentences.en: Since Tesla first launched Robotaxi in June 2025 with a small fleet of Model Ys and safety monitors, the rollout of the company's ride-hailing service has been slower than Musk's predictions.
sentences.zh: 自特斯拉于 2025 年 6 月首次推出 Robotaxi（配备少量 Model Y 和安全监视器）以来，该公司打车服务的推出速度一直慢于马斯克的预测。

blocks.html_en: The CEO said in July 2025 that Tesla could reach half the US population by the end of 2025, pending regulatory approval.

sentences.en: The CEO said in July 2025 that Tesla could reach half the US population by the end of 2025, pending regulatory approval.
sentences.zh: 这位首席执行官在 2025 年 7 月表示，特斯拉可能会在 2025 年底前覆盖美国一半人口，但尚待监管部门批准。

blocks.html_en: Tesla now lists seven US metropolitan regions, including two Florida cities — Orlando and Tampa — announced on the eve of the company's Q2 earnings call.

sentences.en: Tesla now lists seven US metropolitan regions, including two Florida cities — Orlando and Tampa — announced on the eve of the company's Q2 earnings call.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉在第二季度财报电话会议前夕宣布，目前列出了美国七个大都市地区的名单，其中包括佛罗里达州的两个城市——奥兰多和坦帕。

blocks.html_en: The company has yet to disclose the size of its overall fleet, number of paid rides, intervention rates, or the economics of each trip.

sentences.en: The company has yet to disclose the size of its overall fleet, number of paid rides, intervention rates, or the economics of each trip.
sentences.zh: 该公司尚未透露其车队整体规模、付费乘车次数、干预率或每次出行的经济效益。

blocks.html_en: Musk said during the earnings call that safety is central to the constraints on Robotaxi's deployment scale.

sentences.en: Musk said during the earnings call that safety is central to the constraints on Robotaxi's deployment scale.
sentences.zh: 马斯克在财报电话会议上表示，安全是限制 Robotaxi 部署规模的核心。

blocks.html_en: "If we injure even one person, it will be worldwide headline news, and regulators will immediately clamp down on our activities," he said. "We're going as fast as humanly possible in scaling Robotaxi, but while trying to ensure that we do not harm anyone at all and ideally do not even run over a pet."

sentences.en: "If we injure even one person, it will be worldwide headline news, and regulators will immediately clamp down on our activities," he said.
sentences.zh: 他说：“如果我们伤害哪怕一个人，这都会成为全球头条新闻，监管机构将立即取缔我们的活动。”

sentences.en: "We're going as fast as humanly possible in scaling Robotaxi, but while trying to ensure that we do not harm anyone at all and ideally do not even run over a pet."
sentences.zh: “我们将尽可能快地扩展 Robotaxi，同时努力确保我们不会伤害任何人，最好甚至不会碾压宠物。”

blocks.html_en: Here are seven numbers that demonstrate Tesla's Robotaxi progress:

sentences.en: Here are seven numbers that demonstrate Tesla's Robotaxi progress:

sentences.zh: 总付费里程近 250 万英里

blocks.html_en: Tesla said in its shareholder deck that Robotaxi had reached nearly 2.5 million cumulative paid miles by the end of the second quarter.

blocks.html_en: The figure includes trips with a safety monitor — a human supervisor who oversees the autonomous software — in the car. In the San Francisco Bay Area, a safety monitor remains behind the wheel.

sentences.en: In the San Francisco Bay Area, a safety monitor remains behind the wheel.
sentences.zh: 在旧金山湾区，安全监控员仍在驾驶。

blocks.html_en: This is one of the more concrete figures Tesla has provided around its progress for unsupervised rides. Tesla has yet to reveal how many cars are operating without a safety monitor.

sentences.zh: 特斯拉尚未透露有多少辆汽车在没有安全监控器的情况下运行。

blocks.html_en: For comparison, Alphabet's Waymo has driven more than 200 million fully autonomous, rider-only miles.

sentences.en: For comparison, Alphabet's Waymo has driven more than 200 million fully autonomous, rider-only miles.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，Alphabet 旗下的 Waymo 已经驾驶了超过 2 亿英里的全自动驾驶里程。

sentences.zh: 每周里程增长超过 10%

blocks.html_en: Musk said Robotaxi has seen a growth rate of more than 10% for miles driven per week.

sentences.en: Musk said Robotaxi has seen a growth rate of more than 10% for miles driven per week.

blocks.html_en: Similarly, Elluswamy said unsupervised mileage has increased at "double-digit growth rates" per week since the beginning of the year.

sentences.en: Similarly, Elluswamy said unsupervised mileage has increased at "double-digit growth rates" per week since the beginning of the year.
sentences.zh: 同样，埃勒斯瓦米表示，自今年年初以来，无人监管的里程每周以“两位数的增长率”增加。

blocks.html_en: "We expect to continue growing at such a large rate through the rest of this year," Elluswamy said.

sentences.en: "We expect to continue growing at such a large rate through the rest of this year," Elluswamy said.

sentences.en: Seven US metropolitan regions
sentences.zh: 美国七个大都市区

blocks.html_en: Tesla said Robotaxi is now active in seven US markets: Austin, Dallas, Houston, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, and the San Francisco Bay Area.

sentences.en: Tesla said Robotaxi is now active in seven US markets: Austin, Dallas, Houston, Miami, Orlando, Tampa, and the San Francisco Bay Area.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉表示，Robotaxi 目前活跃在美国七个市场：奥斯汀、达拉斯、休斯顿、迈阿密、奥兰多、坦帕和旧金山湾区。

blocks.html_en: All regions except for the Bay Area are "ramping unsupervised" rides, the company said in the shareholder deck.

sentences.en: All regions except for the Bay Area are "ramping unsupervised" rides, the company said in the shareholder deck.
sentences.zh: 该公司在股东声明中表示，除湾区外，所有地区都在“增加无人监管”的游乐设施。

blocks.html_en: Tesla is also targeting Phoenix and Las Vegas, with "preparations underway."

sentences.en: Tesla is also targeting Phoenix and Las Vegas, with "preparations underway."
sentences.zh: 特斯拉还瞄准了菲尼克斯和拉斯维加斯，“准备工作正在进行中”。

blocks.html_en: Meanwhile, Waymo operates in 11 US regions.

sentences.en: Meanwhile, Waymo operates in 11 US regions.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，Waymo 在美国 11 个地区开展业务。

blocks.html_en: 5. Zero 'notable incidents' from Robotaxi

sentences.en: Zero 'notable incidents' from Robotaxi
sentences.zh: Robotaxi 零“显着事件”

blocks.html_en: Elluswamy said that there have been "zero notable incidents" over the more than 380,000 unsupervised Robotaxi miles driven. He added that the known incidents involved other road users hitting stationary Teslas.

sentences.en: Elluswamy said that there have been "zero notable incidents" over the more than 380,000 unsupervised Robotaxi miles driven.
sentences.zh: Elluswamy 表示，在无人监管的 Robotaxi 行驶里程超过 38 万英里的过程中，“零重大事故”。

sentences.en: He added that the known incidents involved other road users hitting stationary Teslas.
sentences.zh: 他补充说，已知的事件涉及其他道路使用者撞到静止的特斯拉汽车。

blocks.html_en: Tesla has reported crashes to federal regulators, including two low-speed crashes that occurred after Tesla's teleoperator assumed direct control of the car. Both incidents had a safety monitor behind the wheel.

sentences.en: Tesla has reported crashes to federal regulators, including two low-speed crashes that occurred after Tesla's teleoperator assumed direct control of the car.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉已向联邦监管机构报告了几起撞车事故，其中包括两起低速撞车事故，这些事故是在特斯拉的远程操作员直接控制汽车后发生的。

sentences.en: Both incidents had a safety monitor behind the wheel.
sentences.zh: 这两起事故都有安全监控员在驾驶。

blocks.html_en: Elluswamy said the progress was a "huge validation of Tesla's entire AI approach."

sentences.en: Elluswamy said the progress was a "huge validation of Tesla's entire AI approach."
sentences.zh: Elluswamy 表示，这一进展是“对特斯拉整个人工智能方法的巨大验证”。

blocks.html_en: 6. More than 125,000 Cybercabs in manufacturing capacity

blocks.html_en: Tesla said it installed an annual manufacturing capacity of more than 125,000 Cybercabs — the company's purpose-built robotaxi — at Gigafactory Texas. Production began during the second quarter.

sentences.en: Production began during the second quarter.
sentences.zh: 第二季度开始生产。

blocks.html_en: For comparison, Zoox, Amazon's robotaxi venture, says its factory in Hayward, California can assemble more than 10,000 purpose-built robotaxis a year once it operates at full scale. Waymo has said that its Arizona plant can build "tens of thousands" of robotaxis at full buildout.

sentences.zh: 相比之下，亚马逊的机器人出租车企业 Zoox 表示，其位于加利福尼亚州海沃德的工厂一旦全面运营，每年可以组装 10,000 多辆专用机器人出租车。

sentences.en: Waymo has said that its Arizona plant can build "tens of thousands" of robotaxis at full buildout.
sentences.zh: Waymo 表示，其亚利桑那州工厂全面扩建后可以生产“数万”辆机器人出租车。

blocks.html_en: Tesla's number does not represent the current production rate, which was not disclosed.

sentences.en: Tesla's number does not represent the current production rate, which was not disclosed.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉的数字并不代表目前的生产率，目前的生产率并未披露。

blocks.html_en: Musk said the Cybercab needs to accumulate more driving data specific to its chassis before the company can put more on the road.

sentences.en: Musk said the Cybercab needs to accumulate more driving data specific to its chassis before the company can put more on the road.
sentences.zh: 马斯克表示，Cyber​​cab 需要积累更多特定于其底盘的驾驶数据，然后公司才能将更多数据上路。

blocks.html_en: Employees have started taking autonomous rides in the car at Gigafactory, Tesla said.

sentences.en: Employees have started taking autonomous rides in the car at Gigafactory, Tesla said.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉表示，员工已开始在超级工厂乘坐自动驾驶汽车。

blocks.html_en: 7. Nearly 1.5 million paid FSD customers

sentences.en: Nearly 1.5 million paid FSD customers
sentences.zh: 近 150 万付费 FSD 客户

blocks.html_en: Tesla reported 1.48 million paying customers of Full Self-Driving, the automaker's advanced driver-assistance system. That represents a 56% year-over-year increase.

sentences.en: Tesla reported 1.48 million paying customers of Full Self-Driving, the automaker's advanced driver-assistance system.
sentences.zh: 特斯拉报告称，该汽车制造商的先进驾驶辅助系统全自动驾驶付费客户数量达到 148 万。

sentences.en: That represents a 56% year-over-year increase.
sentences.zh: 这意味着同比增长 56%。

blocks.html_en: While FSD for personally owned vehicles requires constant human supervision, one of Tesla's long-standing promises is that the tech will no longer require driver monitoring.

sentences.en: While FSD for personally owned vehicles requires constant human supervision, one of Tesla's long-standing promises is that the tech will no longer require driver monitoring.
sentences.zh: 虽然个人车辆的 FSD 需要持续的人工监督，但特斯拉的长期承诺之一是该技术将不再需要驾驶员监控。

blocks.html_en: • Tesla

content_html_zh:
我们有更多有关特斯拉 Robotaxi 进展的数据。 以下是最重要的 7 个。

作者：Lloyd Lee 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

特斯拉有一些数字可以夸耀其在 Robotaxi 上的进展。

首席执行官埃隆·马斯克和其他高管在周三的特斯拉第二季度财报电话会议上表示，该公司将继续扩大其自动驾驶叫车平台，增加更多城市和更多无人监管的乘车服务。

自特斯拉于 2025 年 6 月首次推出 Robotaxi（配备少量 Model Y 和安全监视器）以来，该公司打车服务的推出速度一直慢于马斯克的预测。

这位首席执行官在 2025 年 7 月表示，特斯拉可能会在 2025 年底前覆盖美国一半人口，但尚待监管部门批准。

特斯拉在第二季度财报电话会议前夕宣布，目前列出了美国七个大都市地区的名单，其中包括佛罗里达州的两个城市——奥兰多和坦帕。

该公司尚未透露其车队整体规模、付费乘车次数、干预率或每次出行的经济效益。

马斯克在财报电话会议上表示，安全是限制 Robotaxi 部署规模的核心。

他说：“如果我们伤害哪怕一个人，这都会成为全球头条新闻，监管机构将立即取缔我们的活动。” “我们将尽可能快地扩展 Robotaxi，同时努力确保我们不会伤害任何人，最好甚至不会碾压宠物。”

以下七个数字展示了特斯拉 Robotaxi 的进展：

1. 总付费里程近 250 万英里

特斯拉在其股东报告中表示，截至第二季度末，Robotaxi 累计付费里程已达到近 250 万英里。

该数字包括在车内配备安全监控员（负责监督自主软件的人类主管）的行程。 在旧金山湾区，安全监控员仍在驾驶。

2. 超过 380,000 英里无人监管里程

特斯拉人工智能副总裁 Ashok Elluswamy 表示，Robotaxi 已在两个不同州的 6 个城市在无人监管的情况下行驶了超过 38 万英里。

这是特斯拉就其无人监管乘车进展提供的更具体的数据之一。 特斯拉尚未透露有多少辆汽车在没有安全监控器的情况下运行。

相比之下，Alphabet 旗下的 Waymo 已经驾驶了超过 2 亿英里的全自动驾驶里程。

3. 每周里程增长超过 10%

马斯克表示，Robotaxi 的每周行驶里程增长率超过 10%。

同样，埃勒斯瓦米表示，自今年年初以来，无人监管的里程每周以“两位数的增长率”增加。

“我们预计今年剩余时间将继续以如此高的速度增长，”埃勒斯瓦米说。

4. 美国七个大都市区

特斯拉表示，Robotaxi 目前活跃在美国七个市场：奥斯汀、达拉斯、休斯顿、迈阿密、奥兰多、坦帕和旧金山湾区。

该公司在股东声明中表示，除湾区外，所有地区都在“增加无人监管”的游乐设施。

特斯拉还瞄准了菲尼克斯和拉斯维加斯，“准备工作正在进行中”。

与此同时，Waymo 在美国 11 个地区开展业务。

5. Robotaxi 零“显着事件”

Elluswamy 表示，在无人监管的 Robotaxi 行驶里程超过 38 万英里的过程中，“零重大事故”。 他补充说，已知的事件涉及其他道路使用者撞到静止的特斯拉汽车。

特斯拉已向联邦监管机构报告了几起撞车事故，其中包括两起低速撞车事故，这些事故是在特斯拉的远程操作员直接控制汽车后发生的。 这两起事故都有安全监控员在驾驶。

Elluswamy 表示，这一进展是“对特斯拉整个人工智能方法的巨大验证”。

6. 超过 125,000 辆 Cyber​​cab 的生产能力

特斯拉表示，其德克萨斯州 Gigafactory 的年产能超过 125,000 辆 Cyber​​cab（该公司专门制造的机器人出租车）。 第二季度开始生产。

相比之下，亚马逊的机器人出租车企业 Zoox 表示，其位于加利福尼亚州海沃德的工厂一旦全面运营，每年可以组装 10,000 多辆专用机器人出租车。 Waymo 表示，其亚利桑那州工厂全面扩建后可以生产“数万”辆机器人出租车。

特斯拉的数字并不代表目前的生产率，目前的生产率并未披露。

马斯克表示，Cyber​​cab 需要积累更多特定于其底盘的驾驶数据，然后公司才能将更多数据上路。

特斯拉表示，员工已开始在超级工厂乘坐自动驾驶汽车。

7. 近 150 万付费 FSD 客户

特斯拉报告称，该汽车制造商的先进驾驶辅助系统全自动驾驶付费客户数量达到 148 万。 这意味着同比增长 56%。

虽然个人车辆的 FSD 需要持续的人工监督，但特斯拉的长期承诺之一是该技术将不再需要驾驶员监控。
